subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath drawn aside from the countenance of one among His Names the veils of glory, whereat all who dwell on earth were seized with fear [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی کشف عن وجه اسم من الاسماء سبحات الجلال اذا فزع کلمن فی الارض
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @suffering and imprisonment, @praise and encouragement, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
